Content:
Download(v3.1.5) ЁЯСЙ HERE

release date: 03/06/2026
--- ### What's New in v3.1.5 - Import music directly from any public Spotify playlist URL. - Added support for Trending (from Spotify) in 75+ countries. - Fixed an issue where some playlists, albums, or songs appeared empty or incomplete in certain countries. - Fixed downloads being interrupted or killed while running in the background. - Fixed various offline mode issues for a more reliable listening experience. - Minor bug fixes and performance improvements. ### If you have any suggestion (new add-on or fix), message me on telegram > https://t.me/deveIoper_X --- ## тЬи Features
ЁЯОз **HighтАСQuality Streaming** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ ЁЯУе **Offline Downloads** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ тЭдя╕П **Likes & Custom Playlists** ЁЯФД **Background Play** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ ЁЯЪл **No Login Required** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ ЁЯЖУ **100% Free & AdтАСFree**
### ЁЯМН Languages Supported (i18n) | ЁЯЗйЁЯЗк Deutsch | ЁЯЗ║ЁЯЗ╕ English | ЁЯЗкЁЯЗ╕ Espa├▒ol | ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Fran├зais | ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ▒ ╫в╫С╫и╫Щ╫к | ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ рд╣рд┐рдиреНрджреА | ЁЯЗ╖ЁЯЗ║ ╨а╤Г╤Б╤Б╨║╨╕╨╣ | ЁЯЗиЁЯЗ│ ф╕нцЦЗ | ЁЯЗ╣ЁЯЗ╖ T├╝rk├зe | |------------|------------|------------|------------|----------|------------|------------|--------|------------| *More languages coming soon тАФ contributions welcome!*

Unduh(v3.1.5) ЁЯСЙ DI SINI

tanggal rilis: 03/06/2026
--- ### Apa yang Baru di v3.1.5 - Impor musik langsung dari URL playlist publik Spotify mana pun. - Menambahkan dukungan untuk Trending (dari Spotify) di 75+ negara. - Memperbaiki masalah di mana beberapa playlist, album, atau lagu tampak kosong atau tidak lengkap di beberapa negara. - Memperbaiki unduhan yang terputus atau berhenti saat berjalan di latar belakang. - Memperbaiki berbagai masalah mode offline untuk pengalaman mendengarkan yang lebih andal. - Perbaikan bug minor dan peningkatan performa. ### Jika Anda memiliki saran (fitur baru atau perbaikan), kirim pesan ke telegram saya > https://t.me/deveIoper_X --- ## тЬи Fitur
ЁЯОз **Streaming Berkualitas Tinggi** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ ЁЯУе **Unduhan Offline** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ тЭдя╕П **Suka & Playlist Kustom** ЁЯФД **Putar di Latar Belakang** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ ЁЯЪл **Tanpa Login** тАВ ┬╖ тАВ ЁЯЖУ **100% Gratis & Bebas Iklan**

Content:
---

### ЁЯОи Look & Feel
- **Revamped UI** тАУ clean, modern design with smooth transitions
- **Mini Player** тАУ capsuleтАСstyle mini player on compatible devices (OnePlus, etc.)
- **Theming** тАУ Dark mode, Light mode, and Auto mode

### ЁЯО╝ Music Experience
- **Search** тАУ find songs, public playlists, albums, and artists
- **Offline Listening** тАУ download tracks and play them without internet
- **Custom Playlists** тАУ create, manage, and organize your own collections
- **Import Music** directly from spotify playlist url
- **Trending Songs** тАУ regionтАСbased trending tracks powered by IPinfo
- **Artist Albums & Playlists** тАУ full discography browsing now supported

### тЪб Performance & Stability
- **Improved YouTube API** тАУ more reliable streaming
- **Playback Upgrades** тАУ smoother performance, fixed duration and background playback bugs
- **Headset & Lockscreen Controls** тАУ seamless notification controls
- **Paginated Artist Songs** тАУ all songs load completely

---

## ЁЯУЦ Overview

This monorepo delivers **two fully independent music streaming apps** built with cuttingтАСedge technologies:

| App | Platforms | Framework | Location |
|-----|-----------|-----------|----------|
| ЁЯУ▒ **Mobile** | Android, iOS | React Native + Expo | `openspot-mobile/` |
| ЁЯЦея╕П **Desktop** | macOS, Windows/Linux | Tauri + React | `openspot-desktop/` |

Both apps share the same powerful streaming core, giving you a seamless listening experience across all your devices.

---

## ЁЯз░ Tech Stack
Translation:
---

### ЁЯОи Tampilan & Nuansa
- **UI Diperbarui** тАУ desain bersih dan modern dengan transisi yang mulus
- **Mini Player** тАУ mini player bergaya kapsul di perangkat yang kompatibel (OnePlus, dll.)
- **Tema** тАУ Mode Gelap, Mode Terang, dan Mode Otomatis

### ЁЯО╝ Pengalaman Musik
- **Pencarian** тАУ temukan lagu, playlist publik, album, dan artis
- **Mendengarkan Offline** тАУ unduh lagu dan putar tanpa internet
- **Playlist Kustom** тАУ buat, kelola, dan atur koleksi Anda sendiri
- **Impor Musik** langsung dari url playlist spotify
- **Lagu Trending** тАУ lagu trending berbasis wilayah didukung oleh IPinfo
- **Album & Playlist Artis** тАУ penjelajahan diskografi lengkap kini didukung

### тЪб Performa & Stabilitas
- **API YouTube Ditingkatkan** тАУ streaming lebih andal
- **Peningkatan Pemutaran** тАУ performa lebih mulus, perbaikan bug durasi dan pemutaran latar belakang
- **Kontrol Headset & Lockscreen** тАУ kontrol notifikasi yang mulus
- **Lagu Artis Berpaginasi** тАУ semua lagu dimuat secara lengkap

---

## ЁЯУЦ Ikhtisar

Monorepo ini menghadirkan **dua aplikasi streaming musik yang benar-benar independen** dengan teknologi mutakhir:

| Aplikasi | Platform | Framework | Lokasi |
|----------|----------|-----------|--------|
| ЁЯУ▒ **Mobile** | Android, iOS | React Native + Expo | `openspot-mobile/` |
| ЁЯЦея╕П **Desktop** | macOS, Windows/Linux | Tauri + React | `openspot-desktop/` |

Kedua aplikasi menggunakan inti streaming yang sama, memberikan pengalaman mendengarkan yang mulus di semua perangkat Anda.

---

## ЁЯз░ Tumpukan Teknologi

Content:
### ЁЯУ▒ Mobile `React Native` ┬╖ `Expo Router` ┬╖ `Expo AV` ┬╖ `EAS Build` ┬╖ `IPinfo API` ### ЁЯЦея╕П Desktop `Tauri` ┬╖ `React` ┬╖ `MaterialтАСUI` ┬╖ `React Context + useReducer` ### ЁЯУК Code Composition ![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-95.7%25-3178C6?style=flat-square&logo=typescript) ![JavaScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/JavaScript-2.6%25-F7DF1E?style=flat-square&logo=javascript) ![CSS](https://img.shields.io/badge/CSS-1.2%25-1572B6?style=flat-square&logo=css3) ![HTML](https://img.shields.io/badge/HTML-0.5%25-E34F26?style=flat-square&logo=html5) --- ## ЁЯМН Community & Support - ЁЯТм **Telegram**: [@openspot_music](https://t.me/openspot_music) - ЁЯРЫ **Issues**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/BlackHatDevX/openspot-music-app/issues) --- ## ЁЯСд Author **Jash Gro** [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/BlackHatDevX-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/BlackHatDevX) [![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/jash--gro-0A66C2?style=for-the-badge&logo=linkedin)](https://linkedin.com/in/jash-gro/) [![Portfolio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Portfolio-bit.ly/jashgro-ff69b4?style=for-the-badge)](https://bit.ly/jashgro) ## ЁЯУД License This project is licensed under the **MIT License** тАУ see the [LICENSE](./LICENSE) file for details. ---
тнР If you enjoy OpenSpot Music, drop a star тАУ it really helps!
Your support keeps the music playing for everyone.
